Instantly reloads your [Crossbow] and restores one cooldown use for your [Grenade|Grenades] upon [Consume|Consuming]
[Freeze], [Shock], [Ignite], or [ArmourBreak|Fully Broken Armour]
Minimum duration between consumptions is {0} second
